name: golang-github-jackc-pgpassfile-dev
title: golang-github-jackc-pgpassfile-dev
description:
parser for PostgreSQL .pgpass files
Package pgpassfile is a parser for PostgreSQL .pgpass files.
.
Extracted and rewritten from original implementation in
(https://github.com/jackc/pgx).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-jackc-pgpassfile-dev because parser for PostgreSQL .pgpass files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-jackc-pgpassfile-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-jackc-pgpassfile-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-jackc-pgpassfile-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
